rationale: Educ. Code §29.014 governs hospital-based school district attendance and funding adjustments. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so the proposed change creates no direct conflict.
quote: (a) This section applies only to a school district that provides education and related services only to students who are confined in or receive educational services in a hospital.
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute. Indirect fiscal impact on school district revenue is possible but does not constitute a statutory conflict.
